bullets: Russia issued a stark warning about the escalating risks of a direct clash between nuclear powers on the fourth anniversary of its full-scale invasion of Ukraine.
A historic blizzard slammed the northeastern United States, leaving millions to dig out and disrupting business activity.
Tensions between the US and Iran intensified as President Trump prepared for his State of the Union address.
US military forces boarded a third sanctioned oil tanker in the Indian Ocean, amid growing international sanctions enforcement.
An Olympics gold medal-winning team politely declined President Trump's invitation to attend his State of the Union address.
cybercab: Tesla announced that the first Cybercab, its fully autonomous robotaxi, has rolled off the production line at Gigafactory Texas.
market_mood: Global stock markets bounced back amid investor unease about AI developments and potential tariffs, with economic tail risks rising to 30% according to Apollo Global.
hot_spot: Russia warns of heightened risks of a direct clash between nuclear powers amid ongoing tensions in Ukraine.
